chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Month of Ramadan and the Reward of Fasting in it

text: 1840 - : وَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِذَا دَخَلَ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ أَطْلَقَ كُلَّ أَسِيرٍ وَ أَعْطَى كُلَّ سَائِلٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1840 - When the Month of Ramadan began, the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) would free every captive and give to every petitioner.
